text:
The SDK spreads `...chain` so `iconUrl` is preserved. The data is there. The issue must be something else — the `chains` array from `useRelayChains` defaults to `[convertViemChainToRelayChain(mainnet)]` while loading, and `mainnet` from viem doesn't have `iconUrl`. So on initial render before the API resolves, `fromChain` gets set to the mainnet fallback which has no `iconUrl`.

But more importantly — looking at the screenshot again, the chain **name** "Ethereum" shows correctly but the icon is missing. This means `iconUrl` is `undefined` or `null` on the chain object being used. Let me check what `ASSETS_RELAY_API` is and whether the URL actually loads:
